name: Heavy Polymerization
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>多</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>た</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>層</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>融</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using 3 or more monsters from your hand or field. You can also banish monsters from your Extra Deck as material, up to the number of monsters your opponent controls, but you lose LP equal to the total ATK of monsters banished this way, when the monster is Fusion Summoned.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using 3 or more monsters from your hand or field. You can also banish monsters from your Extra Deck as material, up to the number of monsters your opponent controls, but you lose LP equal to the total ATK of monsters banished this way, when the monster is Fusion Summoned.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Extra Deck as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
